# addConnection(_:)

**Instance Method**

Adds a new connection to this session.

## Declaration

```swift
func addConnection(_ connection: MIDINetworkConnection) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **connection**: The connection to add.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the session successfully added the connection, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Managing Connections

- **connections()**: Returns the session’s set of MIDI network connections.
- **removeConnection(_:)**: Removes a connection from this session.
